embeddings_retrieval.query_text: Built and deployed embeddings-based retrieval systems to real users in production, using sentence-transformers, BGE, E5, OpenAI embeddings or similar models; handled embedding drift, index refresh, and retrieval-quality regressions at scale.

vector_db_search.query_text: Operated vector databases and hybrid search infrastructure in production — Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, FAISS, OpenSearch or Elasticsearch — combining dense and lexical retrieval to serve candidate and document search.

ranking_eval.query_text: Designed rigorous evaluation frameworks for ranking and search systems — including candidate, talent or people search and ranking — measuring NDCG, MRR and MAP, correlating offline benchmarks with online A/B tests and recruiter feedback to keep improving ranking quality without flying blind.

nlp_ir_background.query_text: Deep background in natural language processing and information retrieval — understood retrieval and ranking before the LLM era — building search, ranking and recommendation systems over text, rather than primarily computer vision, speech or robotics.

product_company.query_text: Shipped applied machine learning systems at product companies serving real users at meaningful scale, owning ranking, search or recommendation in the product, rather than a career spent at consulting or services firms.

production_recency.query_text: Recently shipped production code as a hands-on senior engineer, building and deploying end-to-end ranking or retrieval systems within the last year, rather than moving into non-coding architecture or tech-lead roles.
